programme.title: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: A prospector heads to the Klondike during the wild 1890s gold rush, dreaming of striking it rich, and falls head over heels for a girl he spots at a dance hall.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel is busy trying to grow his empire, while a poor Jewish barber is doing everything he can to dodge persecution from Hynkel's rule.
